1.text: And Solomon<S>8010</S> the son<S>1121</S> of David<S>1732</S> was strengthened<S>2388</S> in his kingdom<S>4438</S>, and the LORD<S>3068</S> his God<S>430</S> was with him, and magnified<S>1431</S> him exceedingly<S>4605</S>.

Then Solomon<S>8010</S> spake<S>559</S> unto all Israel<S>3478</S>, to the captains<S>8269</S> of thousands<S>505</S> and of hundreds<S>3967</S>, and to the judges<S>8199</S>, and to every governor<S>5387</S> in all Israel<S>3478</S>, the chief<S>7218</S> of the fathers<S>1</S>.

So Solomon<S>8010</S>, and all the congregation<S>6951</S> with him, went<S>3212</S> to the high place<S>1116</S> that was at Gibeon<S>1391</S>; for there was the tabernacle<S>168</S> of the congregation<S>4150</S> of God<S>430</S>, which Moses<S>4872</S> the servant<S>5650</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> had made<S>6213</S> in the wilderness<S>4057</S>.

But<S>61</S> the ark<S>727</S> of God<S>430</S> had David<S>1732</S> brought up<S>5927</S> from Kirjathjearim<S>7157</S> to the place which David<S>1732</S> had prepared<S>3559</S> for it: for he had pitched<S>5186</S> a tent<S>168</S> for it at Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

Moreover the brasen<S>5178</S> altar<S>4196</S>, that Bezaleel<S>1212</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Uri<S>221</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Hur<S>2354</S>, had made<S>6213</S>, he put<S>7760</S> before<S>6440</S> the tabernacle<S>4908</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>: and Solomon<S>8010</S> and the congregation<S>6951</S> sought<S>1875</S> unto it. <sup>he put: or, was there</sup>

And Solomon<S>8010</S> went up<S>5927</S> thither to the brasen<S>5178</S> altar<S>4196</S> before<S>6440</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, which was at the tabernacle<S>168</S> of the congregation<S>4150</S>, and offered<S>5927</S> a thousand<S>505</S> burnt offerings<S>5930</S> upon it.
In that night<S>3915</S> did God<S>430</S> appear<S>7200</S> unto Solomon<S>8010</S>, and said<S>559</S> unto him, Ask<S>7592</S> what I shall give<S>5414</S> thee.

And Solomon<S>8010</S> said<S>559</S> unto God<S>430</S>, Thou hast shewed<S>6213</S> great<S>1419</S> mercy<S>2617</S> unto David<S>1732</S> my father<S>1</S>, and hast made me to reign<S>4427</S> in his stead.

Now, O LORD<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S>, let thy promise<S>1697</S> unto David<S>1732</S> my father<S>1</S> be established<S>539</S>: for thou hast made me king<S>4427</S> over a people<S>5971</S> like the dust<S>6083</S> of the earth<S>776</S> in multitude<S>7227</S>. <sup>like: Heb. much as the dust of the earth</sup>

Give<S>5414</S> me now wisdom<S>2451</S> and knowledge<S>4093</S>, that I may go out<S>3318</S> and come in<S>935</S> before<S>6440</S> this people<S>5971</S>: for who can judge<S>8199</S> this thy people<S>5971</S>, that is so great<S>1419</S>?

And God<S>430</S> said<S>559</S> to Solomon<S>8010</S>, Because this was in thine heart<S>3824</S>, and thou hast not asked<S>7592</S> riches<S>6239</S>, wealth<S>5233</S>, or honour<S>3519</S>, nor the life<S>5315</S> of thine enemies<S>8130</S>, neither yet hast asked<S>7592</S> long<S>7227</S> life<S>3117</S>; but hast asked<S>7592</S> wisdom<S>2451</S> and knowledge<S>4093</S> for thyself, that thou mayest judge<S>8199</S> my people<S>5971</S>, over whom I have made thee king<S>4427</S>:

Wisdom<S>2451</S> and knowledge<S>4093</S> is granted<S>5414</S> unto thee; and I will give<S>5414</S> thee riches<S>6239</S>, and wealth<S>5233</S>, and honour<S>3519</S>, such as none of the kings<S>4428</S> have had that have been before<S>6440</S> thee, neither shall there any after<S>310</S> thee have the like.

Then Solomon<S>8010</S> came<S>935</S> from his journey to the high place<S>1116</S> that was at Gibeon<S>1391</S> to Jerusalem<S>3389</S>, from before<S>6440</S> the tabernacle<S>168</S> of the congregation<S>4150</S>, and reigned<S>4427</S> over Israel<S>3478</S>.

And Solomon<S>8010</S> gathered<S>622</S> chariots<S>7393</S> and horsemen<S>6571</S>: and he had a thousand<S>505</S> and four<S>702</S> hundred<S>3967</S> chariots<S>7393</S>, and twelve<S>8147</S> <S>6240</S> thousand<S>505</S> horsemen<S>6571</S>, which he placed<S>3240</S> in the chariot<S>7393</S> cities<S>5892</S>, and with the king<S>4428</S> at Jerusalem<S>3389</S>.

And the king<S>4428</S> made<S>5414</S> silver<S>3701</S> and gold<S>2091</S> at Jerusalem<S>3389</S> as plenteous as stones<S>68</S>, and cedar trees<S>730</S> made<S>5414</S> he as the sycomore trees<S>8256</S> that are in the vale<S>8219</S> for abundance<S>7230</S>. <sup>made: Heb. gave</sup>

And Solomon<S>8010</S> had horses<S>5483</S> brought<S>4161</S> out of Egypt<S>4714</S>, and linen yarn<S>4723</S>: the king's<S>4428</S> merchants<S>5503</S> received<S>3947</S> the linen yarn<S>4723</S> at a price<S>4242</S>. <sup>Solomon: Heb. the going forth of the horses which was Solomon's</sup>

And they fetched up<S>5927</S>, and brought forth<S>3318</S> out of Egypt<S>4714</S> a chariot<S>4818</S> for six<S>8337</S> hundred<S>3967</S> shekels of silver<S>3701</S>, and an horse<S>5483</S> for an hundred<S>3967</S> and fifty<S>2572</S>: and so brought they out<S>3318</S> horses for all the kings<S>4428</S> of the Hittites<S>2850</S>, and for the kings<S>4428</S> of Syria<S>758</S>, by their means<S>3027</S>. <sup>means: Heb. hand</sup>

2.text: And Solomon<S>8010</S> determined<S>559</S> to build<S>1129</S> an house<S>1004</S> for the name<S>8034</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, and an house<S>1004</S> for his kingdom<S>4438</S>.

And Solomon<S>8010</S> told out<S>5608</S> threescore and ten<S>7657</S> thousand<S>505</S> men<S>376</S> to bear burdens<S>5449</S>, and fourscore<S>8084</S> thousand<S>505</S> <S>376</S> to hew<S>2672</S> in the mountain<S>2022</S>, and three<S>7969</S> thousand<S>505</S> and six<S>8337</S> hundred<S>3967</S> to oversee<S>5329</S> them.

And Solomon<S>8010</S> sent<S>7971</S> to Huram<S>2361</S> the king<S>4428</S> of Tyre<S>6865</S>, saying<S>559</S>, As thou didst deal<S>6213</S> with David<S>1732</S> my father<S>1</S>, and didst send<S>7971</S> him cedars<S>730</S> to build<S>1129</S> him an house<S>1004</S> to dwell<S>3427</S> therein, even so deal with me. <sup>Huram: or, Hiram</sup>

Behold, I build<S>1129</S> an house<S>1004</S> to the name<S>8034</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> my God<S>430</S>, to dedicate<S>6942</S> it to him, and to burn<S>6999</S> before<S>6440</S> him sweet<S>5561</S> incense<S>7004</S>, and for the continual<S>8548</S> shewbread<S>4635</S>, and for the burnt offerings<S>5930</S> morning<S>1242</S> and evening<S>6153</S>, on the sabbaths<S>7676</S>, and on the new moons<S>2320</S>, and on the solemn feasts<S>4150</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> our God<S>430</S>. This is an ordinance for ever<S>5769</S> to Israel<S>3478</S>. <sup>sweet: Heb. incense of spices</sup>
And the house<S>1004</S> which I build<S>1129</S> is great<S>1419</S>: for great<S>1419</S> is our God<S>430</S> above all gods<S>430</S>.

But who is able<S>6113</S> <S>3581</S> to build<S>1129</S> him an house<S>1004</S>, seeing the heaven<S>8064</S> and heaven<S>8064</S> of heavens<S>8064</S> cannot contain<S>3557</S> him? who am I then, that I should build<S>1129</S> him an house<S>1004</S>, save only<S>518</S> to burn sacrifice<S>6999</S> before<S>6440</S> him? <sup>is able: Heb. hath retained, or, obtained strength</sup>

Send<S>7971</S> me now therefore a man<S>376</S> cunning<S>2450</S> to work<S>6213</S> in gold<S>2091</S>, and in silver<S>3701</S>, and in brass<S>5178</S>, and in iron<S>1270</S>, and in purple<S>710</S>, and crimson<S>3758</S>, and blue<S>8504</S>, and that can skill<S>3045</S> to grave<S>6605</S> <S>6603</S> with the cunning men<S>2450</S> that are with me in Judah<S>3063</S> and in Jerusalem<S>3389</S>, whom David<S>1732</S> my father<S>1</S> did provide<S>3559</S>. <sup>to grave: Heb. to grave gravings</sup>

Send<S>7971</S> me also cedar<S>730</S> trees<S>6086</S>, fir trees<S>1265</S>, and algum trees<S>418</S>, out of Lebanon<S>3844</S>: for I know<S>3045</S> that thy servants<S>5650</S> can skill<S>3045</S> to cut<S>3772</S> timber<S>6086</S> in Lebanon<S>3844</S>; and, behold, my servants<S>5650</S> shall be with thy servants<S>5650</S>, <sup>algum: or, Almuggim, I.Kin.10.11.</sup>

Even to prepare<S>3559</S> me timber<S>6086</S> in abundance<S>7230</S>: for the house<S>1004</S> which I am about to build<S>1129</S> shall be wonderful<S>6381</S> great<S>1419</S>. <sup>wonderful: Heb. great and wonderful</sup>

And, behold, I will give<S>5414</S> to thy servants<S>5650</S>, the hewers<S>2404</S> that cut<S>3772</S> timber<S>6086</S>, twenty<S>6242</S> thousand<S>505</S> measures<S>3734</S> of beaten<S>4347</S> wheat<S>2406</S>, and twenty<S>6242</S> thousand<S>505</S> measures<S>3734</S> of barley<S>8184</S>, and twenty<S>6242</S> thousand<S>505</S> baths<S>1324</S> of wine<S>3196</S>, and twenty<S>6242</S> thousand<S>505</S> baths<S>1324</S> of oil<S>8081</S>.

Then Huram<S>2361</S> the king<S>4428</S> of Tyre<S>6865</S> answered<S>559</S> in writing<S>3791</S>, which he sent<S>7971</S> to Solomon<S>8010</S>, Because the LORD<S>3068</S> hath loved<S>160</S> his people<S>5971</S>, he hath made<S>5414</S> thee king<S>4428</S> over them.

Huram<S>2361</S> said<S>559</S> moreover, Blessed<S>1288</S> be the LORD<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, that made<S>6213</S> heaven<S>8064</S> and earth<S>776</S>, who hath given<S>5414</S> to David<S>1732</S> the king<S>4428</S> a wise<S>2450</S> son<S>1121</S>, endued<S>3045</S> with prudence<S>7922</S> and understanding<S>998</S>, that might build<S>1129</S> an house<S>1004</S> for the LORD<S>3068</S>, and an house<S>1004</S> for his kingdom<S>4438</S>. <sup>endued: Heb. knowing prudence and understanding</sup>
And now I have sent<S>7971</S> a cunning<S>2450</S> man<S>376</S>, endued<S>3045</S> with understanding<S>998</S>, of Huram<S>2361</S> my father's<S>1</S>,

The son<S>1121</S> of a woman<S>802</S> of the daughters<S>1323</S> of Dan<S>1835</S>, and his father<S>1</S> was a man<S>376</S> of Tyre<S>6876</S>, skilful<S>3045</S> to work<S>6213</S> in gold<S>2091</S>, and in silver<S>3701</S>, in brass<S>5178</S>, in iron<S>1270</S>, in stone<S>68</S>, and in timber<S>6086</S>, in purple<S>713</S>, in blue<S>8504</S>, and in fine linen<S>948</S>, and in crimson<S>3758</S>; also to grave<S>6605</S> any manner of graving<S>6603</S>, and to find out<S>2803</S> every device<S>4284</S> which shall be put<S>5414</S> to him, with thy cunning men<S>2450</S>, and with the cunning men<S>2450</S> of my lord<S>113</S> David<S>1732</S> thy father<S>1</S>.

Now therefore the wheat<S>2406</S>, and the barley<S>8184</S>, the oil<S>8081</S>, and the wine<S>3196</S>, which my lord<S>113</S> hath spoken<S>559</S> of, let him send<S>7971</S> unto his servants<S>5650</S>:

And we will cut<S>3772</S> wood<S>6086</S> out of Lebanon<S>3844</S>, as much as thou shalt need<S>6878</S>: and we will bring<S>935</S> it to thee in floats<S>7513</S> by sea<S>3220</S> to Joppa<S>3305</S>; and thou shalt carry it up<S>5927</S> to Jerusalem<S>3389</S>. <sup>as much: Heb according to all thy need</sup> <sup>Joppa: Heb. Japho</sup>

And Solomon<S>8010</S> numbered<S>5608</S> all the strangers<S>582</S> <S>1616</S> that were in the land<S>776</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, after<S>310</S> the numbering<S>5610</S> wherewith David<S>1732</S> his father<S>1</S> had numbered<S>5608</S> them; and they were found<S>4672</S> an hundred<S>3967</S> and fifty<S>2572</S> thousand<S>505</S> and three<S>7969</S> thousand<S>505</S> and six<S>8337</S> hundred<S>3967</S>. <sup>the strangers: Heb. the men the strangers</sup>

And he set<S>6213</S> threescore and ten<S>7657</S> thousand<S>505</S> of them to be bearers of burdens<S>5449</S>, and fourscore<S>8084</S> thousand<S>505</S> to be hewers<S>2672</S> in the mountain<S>2022</S>, and three<S>7969</S> thousand<S>505</S> and six<S>8337</S> hundred<S>3967</S> overseers<S>5329</S> to set<S>5647</S> the people<S>5971</S> a work<S>5647</S>.

3.text: Then Solomon<S>8010</S> began<S>2490</S> to build<S>1129</S> the house<S>1004</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> at Jerusalem<S>3389</S> in mount<S>2022</S> Moriah<S>4179</S>, where the LORD appeared<S>7200</S> unto David<S>1732</S> his father<S>1</S>, in the place<S>4725</S> that David<S>1732</S> had prepared<S>3559</S> in the threshingfloor<S>1637</S> of Ornan<S>771</S> the Jebusite<S>2983</S>. <sup>where: or, which was seen of David his father</sup>
And he began<S>2490</S> to build<S>1129</S> in the second<S>8145</S> day of the second<S>8145</S> month<S>2320</S>, in the fourth<S>702</S> year<S>8141</S> of his reign<S>4438</S>.

Now these are the things wherein Solomon<S>8010</S> was instructed<S>3245</S> for the building<S>1129</S> of the house<S>1004</S> of God<S>430</S>. The length<S>753</S> by cubits<S>520</S> after the first<S>7223</S> measure<S>4060</S> was threescore<S>8346</S> cubits<S>520</S>, and the breadth<S>7341</S> twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S>. <sup>instructed: Heb. founded</sup>

And the porch<S>197</S> that was in the front<S>6440</S> of the house, the length<S>753</S> of it was according to the breadth<S>7341</S> of the house<S>1004</S>, twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S>, and the height<S>1363</S> was an hundred<S>3967</S> and twenty<S>6242</S>: and he overlaid<S>6823</S> it within<S>6441</S> with pure<S>2889</S> gold<S>2091</S>.

And the greater<S>1419</S> house<S>1004</S> he cieled<S>2645</S> with fir<S>1265</S> tree<S>6086</S>, which he overlaid<S>2645</S> with fine<S>2896</S> gold<S>2091</S>, and set<S>5927</S> thereon palm trees<S>8561</S> and chains<S>8333</S>.

And he garnished<S>6823</S> the house<S>1004</S> with precious<S>3368</S> stones<S>68</S> for beauty<S>8597</S>: and the gold<S>2091</S> was gold<S>2091</S> of Parvaim<S>6516</S>. <sup>garnished: Heb. covered</sup>

He overlaid<S>2645</S> also the house<S>1004</S>, the beams<S>6982</S>, the posts<S>5592</S>, and the walls<S>7023</S> thereof, and the doors<S>1817</S> thereof, with gold<S>2091</S>; and graved<S>6605</S> cherubims<S>3742</S> on the walls<S>7023</S>.

And he made<S>6213</S> the most<S>6944</S> holy<S>6944</S> house<S>1004</S>, the length<S>753</S> whereof was according to<S>6440</S> the breadth<S>7341</S> of the house<S>1004</S>, twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S>, and the breadth<S>7341</S> thereof twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S>: and he overlaid<S>2645</S> it with fine<S>2896</S> gold<S>2091</S>, amounting to six<S>8337</S> hundred<S>3967</S> talents<S>3603</S>.
And the weight<S>4948</S> of the nails<S>4548</S> was fifty<S>2572</S> shekels<S>8255</S> of gold<S>2091</S>. And he overlaid<S>2645</S> the upper chambers<S>5944</S> with gold<S>2091</S>.

And in the most<S>6944</S> holy<S>6944</S> house<S>1004</S> he made<S>6213</S> two<S>8147</S> cherubims<S>3742</S> of image<S>6816</S> work<S>4639</S>, and overlaid<S>6823</S> them with gold<S>2091</S>. <sup>image: or, (as some think) of moveable work</sup>

And the wings<S>3671</S> of the cherubims<S>3742</S> were twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S> long<S>753</S>: one<S>259</S> wing<S>3671</S> of the one cherub was five<S>2568</S> cubits<S>520</S>, reaching<S>5060</S> to the wall<S>7023</S> of the house<S>1004</S>: and the other<S>312</S> wing<S>3671</S> was likewise five<S>2568</S> cubits<S>520</S>, reaching<S>5060</S> to the wing<S>3671</S> of the other<S>312</S> cherub<S>3742</S>.

And one wing<S>3671</S> of the other<S>259</S> cherub<S>3742</S> was five<S>2568</S> cubits<S>520</S>, reaching<S>5060</S> to the wall<S>7023</S> of the house<S>1004</S>: and the other<S>312</S> wing<S>3671</S> was five<S>2568</S> cubits<S>520</S> also, joining<S>1695</S> to the wing<S>3671</S> of the other<S>312</S> cherub<S>3742</S>.

The wings<S>3671</S> of these cherubims<S>3742</S> spread themselves forth<S>6566</S> twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S>: and they stood<S>5975</S> on their feet<S>7272</S>, and their faces<S>6440</S> were inward<S>1004</S>. <sup>inward: or, toward the house</sup>

And he made<S>6213</S> the vail<S>6532</S> of blue<S>8504</S>, and purple<S>713</S>, and crimson<S>3758</S>, and fine linen<S>948</S>, and wrought<S>5927</S> cherubims<S>3742</S> thereon. <sup>wrought: Heb. caused to ascend</sup>

Also he made<S>6213</S> before<S>6440</S> the house<S>1004</S> two<S>8147</S> pillars<S>5982</S> of thirty<S>7970</S> and five<S>2568</S> cubits<S>520</S> high<S>753</S>, and the chapiter<S>6858</S> that was on the top<S>7218</S> of each of them was five<S>2568</S> cubits<S>520</S>. <sup>high: Heb. long</sup>

And he made<S>6213</S> chains<S>8333</S>, as in the oracle<S>1687</S>, and put<S>5414</S> them on the heads<S>7218</S> of the pillars<S>5982</S>; and made<S>6213</S> an hundred<S>3967</S> pomegranates<S>7416</S>, and put<S>5414</S> them on the chains<S>8333</S>.

And he reared up<S>6965</S> the pillars<S>5982</S> before<S>6440</S> the temple<S>1964</S>, one<S>259</S> on the right hand<S>3225</S>, and the other<S>259</S> on the left<S>8040</S>; and called<S>7121</S> the name<S>8034</S> of that on the right hand<S>3233</S> <S>3227</S> Jachin<S>3199</S>, and the name<S>8034</S> of that on the left<S>8042</S> Boaz<S>1162</S>. <sup>Jachin: that is, He shall establish</sup> <sup>Boaz: that is, In it is strength</sup>

4.text: Moreover he made<S>6213</S> an altar<S>4196</S> of brass<S>5178</S>, twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S> the length<S>753</S> thereof, and twenty<S>6242</S> cubits<S>520</S> the breadth<S>7341</S> thereof, and ten<S>6235</S> cubits<S>520</S> the height<S>6967</S> thereof.

Also he made<S>6213</S> a molten<S>3332</S> sea<S>3220</S> of ten<S>6235</S> cubits<S>520</S> from brim<S>8193</S> to brim<S>8193</S>, round<S>5696</S> in compass<S>5439</S>, and five<S>2568</S> cubits<S>520</S> the height<S>6967</S> thereof; and a line<S>6957</S> of thirty<S>7970</S> cubits<S>520</S> did compass<S>5437</S> it round about<S>5439</S>. <sup>from: Heb. from his brim to his brim</sup>
